products.name: Desert Wind™ MIL-STD 810H Blowing Sand and Dust Environmental Test Chambers
products.descriptor: MIL-STD-810H automated blowing sand and dust environmental test chamber for military and aerospace

evidence.snippet:
MIL-STD 810H Sand and Dust Environmental Test Chambers
======================================================
Military equipment used in extreme desert conditions must meet demanding testing standards. The Air Dynamics-engineered Desert Wind™ is a MIL-STD-810 blowing sand and dust test chamber designed to ensure all equipment is up to the task of operating in the desert.

Desert Wind™ test chambers ensure products reliably perform to specs in harsh environments. They can help reduce or eliminate field failure of electronics, vehicles, and military equipment. The patented design allows testing to meet or exceed the following standards: MIL-STD-810H, DO-160G, MIL-STD-202, and AECTP 300, Method 313.

Examples of clients currently using Desert Wind™ MIL-STD 810H Blowing Sand and Dust Environmental Test Chambers include:
*   United States Naval Air Warfare Center
*   U.S. Department of Defense
*   Canada’s Aerospace Technology Center

products.name: Desert Wind™ Jet Propulsion Engine Abrasion Testing & Validation System
products.descriptor: Custom jet engine abrasion testing system simulating up to 20 years of operational conditions

evidence.snippet:
Desert Wind™ Jet Propulsion Engine Abrasion Testing & Validation System
=======================================================================
Desert Wind™ jet engine abrasion testing systems simulate up to 20 years of operational conditions in a controlled environment. Through repeatable testing parameters, they provide unmatched data to [aerospace](aerospace/) and military decision-makers, ensuring safety and operational readiness.

Desert Wind™ Jet Engine Abrasion Testing Systems
------------------------------------------------
Air Dynamics leads the industry in consistent and repeatable jet engine abrasion testing systems. We can customize our Desert Wind™ systems to meet your requirements for wind speed, sand, and dust concentrations. To request a quote, speak with one of our product specialists.
